name: Tarragon Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Pk linguine; cook and drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup, half-and-half, tarragon, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the cooked linguine and cubed chicken until well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to an ungreased 4-quart baking dish.
4. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan and paprika (if using).
5. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
